meta.title: 299note — For pets, vets, and the families who love them.
meta.description: A pet healthcare platform connecting owners and veterinary clinics through health data and shared stories.

hero.headline:
Nurturing pet health,
together with family and vets.
hero.subheadline:
A pet healthcare platform connecting owners and
veterinary clinics through health data and shared stories.

why.title: Why 299note exists
why.para1: Over 9 million households in Japan care for pets today. Pets have become family, and awareness of their health has never been higher.
why.para2: Yet the medical records kept at veterinary clinics and the daily observations of owners still live in separate places. This disconnect limits the precision of preventive care — and the quality of the time families spend saying goodbye.
why.para3: 299note is being built to bridge this gap.

timeline.title: A full life, in a single timeline
timeline.subtitle: Health Timeline
timeline.body: Vaccinations, check-up results, daily observations, and changes in weight and appetite — all shared between family and veterinary clinic in chronological order. Early detection and cherished moments accumulate in one place.

clinic.title: An ongoing dialogue with your vet
clinic.subtitle: Clinic Integration
clinic.body: Not a replacement for existing EMR systems, but a patient-facing layer on top of them. Clinic staff upload test results, owners review them and ask questions at their own pace. Designed to respect existing clinical workflows.

memorial.title: Stories that live past the rainbow bridge
memorial.subtitle: Rainbow Bridge Memorial
memorial.body: After a pet passes, their health records and family memories are woven into a single memorial narrative. A feature that doesn't exist anywhere else in the pet services landscape.

b2b.title: For veterinary clinics
b2b.body:
299note does not replace your existing EMR system. It operates as a patient-facing layer on top of whatever you already use.

Integration is as simple as clinic staff uploading test results. Additional features like reservation management will be considered gradually, based on feedback from partner clinics.

contact.title: Contact
contact.body: For partnerships, clinic adoption, press inquiries or anything else, please feel free to reach out.

about.body: 299note is an independent project in development within the pet healthcare space. Based in Yokohama, Japan, we aim to improve quality of life for pets and their families. Corporate registration planned for 2026.
